message:
feat(wa-core): add watchdog heartbeat system for deadlock detection

Implement a watchdog/heartbeat subsystem that monitors the liveness of
each ObservationRuntime task (discovery, capture, persistence,
maintenance) and logs structured warnings when any component appears
stalled.

New module — crates/wa-core/src/watchdog.rs (489 lines):
- HeartbeatRegistry: lock-free per-component timestamps using AtomicU64
  epoch-millisecond counters; each subsystem calls record_discovery(),
  record_capture(), record_persistence(), or record_maintenance() on
  every loop iteration
- WatchdogConfig: per-component staleness thresholds (discovery 15s,
  capture 5s, persistence 30s, maintenance 2m) with a 30s startup
  grace period before flagging missing heartbeats
- check_health(): evaluates all components against thresholds, returning
  a HealthReport with per-component status (Healthy/Degraded/Critical)
  where Degraded = age > threshold and Critical = age > 2x threshold
- spawn_watchdog(): tokio task that periodically checks health and emits
  structured tracing warnings (warn for Degraded, error + JSON
  diagnostic dump for Critical); respects external shutdown signal
- WatchdogHandle: control handle with signal_shutdown() and join()
- Component, HealthStatus (with Ord), ComponentHealth, HealthReport
  types — all Serialize/Deserialize for JSON diagnostic output
- 8 unit tests covering: default state, heartbeat recording, grace
  period behavior, active/stale/critical detection, serialization
  round-trip, async shutdown, Display impls, and status ordering

Runtime integration — crates/wa-core/src/runtime.rs:
- Add heartbeats: Arc<HeartbeatRegistry> to ObservationRuntime and
  RuntimeHandle, initialized in new() and cloned into start()
- Wire heartbeat recording into each async task:
  - maintenance_task: record_maintenance() at start of each tick
  - discovery_task: record_discovery() on both success and error paths
    of list_panes()
  - capture_task: record_capture() at start of each sync tick
  - persistence_task: record_persistence() on each received event
- Expose heartbeats through RuntimeHandle for external watchdog spawning

Module registration — crates/wa-core/src/lib.rs:
- Add pub mod watchdog to the crate root

This implements the core of wa-37x.2 (Watchdog/heartbeat system). The
monitoring task logs warnings but does not yet perform forced restarts;
that will be added in a future iteration after operational experience
with the heartbeat thresholds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
